Thanksgiving Email Promotion #1	 	                                        Copyright Free Template



Subject:  Thank you to our best customers



First of all, thank you for being one of our loyal 

Customers. 



We want to give Thanks for your patronage by offering 

you this special deal



[insert offer detalls] 



So while everybody else is getting together with family, 

eating copious amounts of food, watching football, and

heading out the door to catch the Black Friday sales…



…you could be sitting pretty thanks to [insert name] 

and this special offer. 



It’s a deal you’ll want to be thankful for this Holiday season

so head on over to the link below…



[insert link]



…to take advantage of this deal. 



[insert benefits they’ll get, like lose weight, get more

customers, etc.]



Happy Thanksgiving!



(insert name)



P.S.  Also, if you’re traveling this season, be careful.  

The day before Thanksgiving is the busiest travel

day of the year. 



But you don’t have to go very far to get [insert special]. 



So take action today, before [insert deadline] goes by

and you’ll be kicking yourself. 



P.P.S.  Also, what are you thankful for this season? 

Be sure to let us know below below. 



[insert social media links]
